name: Fake Taxi & Knuckles
description:
Ever wanted to be a taxi driver? Better yet, a taxi driver from a low tier porno? This is your chance!

Or just... let them go, if you wanna be a normal driver.

Bonus NSFW images on here: https://tinyurl.com/mweznhsh, check them out.

CHARACTERS:

Nami (One piece)

Mirko (My hero academia)

Frieren (Frieren: Beyond Journey's End)

Zero Two (Darling in the Franxx)

Goldship (Umamusume: Pretty Derby)

Marina Ida (Splatoon)

Made a brand new form if you wanna suggest characters for the next taxi bot: https://forms.gle/LGNQsczoM65QRtw79

Use the lorebook!

Every greeting is special and took effort, so check out every each of them!

(Knuckles is a 79.99$ dollar dlc.)
creator: Lunny12
